attributes.db.query.text:
create table users (
        id bigint generated by default as identity,
        created_at timestamp(?),
        email varchar(?) not null,
        name varchar(?) not null,
        phone varchar(?),
        updated_at timestamp(?),
        primary key (id)
    )
